Class ServerEndpoint

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class ServerEndpoint extends Object implements Runnable
ServerEndpoint handles communication with a connected client. It manages the input and output streams, processes commands from the client, and sends updates back to the client.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServerEndpoint(Socket socket, Server server)
    Constructs a new server endpoint for a connected client.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes all streams and the socket to the client.
    int
    getAvatarIndex()
    Returns the avatar index selected by the client.

    Returns the name of the connected player.

    Starts the communication loop with the client.
    void
    sendTableRepresentation(TableRepresentation tableRepresentation)
    Sends the current table representation to the client.
    void
    setName(String name)
    Renames the ServerEndpoint's name, used for avoiding duplicate names.
    void
    setPlayerPTR(Player player)
    Sets the player object associated with this endpoint.

  • Constructor Details

    • ServerEndpoint

      public ServerEndpoint(Socket socket, Server server)
      Constructs a new server endpoint for a connected client.
      Parameters:
      socket - the socket connected to the client
      server - the parent server that manages this endpoint

  • Method Details

    • run

      public void run()
      Starts the communication loop with the client. Handles login data, message receiving, and proper cleanup.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • sendTableRepresentation

      public void sendTableRepresentation(TableRepresentation tableRepresentation) throws IOException
      Sends the current table representation to the client.
      Parameters:
      tableRepresentation - the current state of the game table
      Throws:
      IOException - if sending fails due to I/O error

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the connected player.
      Returns:
      the player name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Renames the ServerEndpoint's name, used for avoiding duplicate names.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name

    • getAvatarIndex

      public int getAvatarIndex()
      Returns the avatar index selected by the client.
      Returns:
      avatar index

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes all streams and the socket to the client.

    • setPlayerPTR

      public void setPlayerPTR(Player player)
      Sets the player object associated with this endpoint.
      Parameters:
      player - the player object to associate
